allow:
Bash(infrastructure/monitoring/prometheus/alertmanager.yml <<'EOF'
global:
  resolve_timeout: 5m

route:
  group_by: ['alertname']
  group_wait: 10s
  group_interval: 10s
  repeat_interval: 1h
  receiver: 'web.hook'

receivers:
- name: 'web.hook'
  webhook_configs:
  - url: 'http://127.0.0.1:5001/'

inhibit_rules:
  - source_match:
      severity: 'critical'
    target_match:
      severity: 'warning'
    equal: ['alertname', 'dev', 'instance']
EOF)

Bash(bash -c '
TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8300/api/v1/auth/login \
  -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" \
  -d '"''"'{""email"":""admin@sdlc-orchestrator.io"",""password"":""Admin@123""}'"''"' | \
  python3 -c ""import sys, json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['"''"'access_token'"''"'])"")

echo ""Token: $TOKEN""
echo

curl -s -H ""Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"" ""http://localhost:8300/api/v1/gates?page=1&page_size=3"" | python3 -m json.tool
')

Bash(bash -c '
TOKEN=""eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJleHAiOjE3NjUxMjI1NDksImlhdCI6MTc2NTExODk0OSwidHlwZSI6ImFjY2VzcyIsInN1YiI6ImEwMDAwMDAwLTAwMDAtMDAwMC0wMDAwLTAwMDAwMDAwMDAwMSJ9.X96r_XfcNAnue-GS83mMLamwffw4PeoWScipKG6zoJI""

')

Bash(bash -c '
# Login and get token
TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8300/api/v1/auth/login \
  -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" \
  -d '"''"'{""email"":""admin@sdlc-orchestrator.io"",""password"":""Admin@123""}'"''"' | \
  python3 -c ""import sys, json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['"''"'access_token'"''"'])"")

echo ""Token obtained: ${TOKEN:0:50}...""
echo

# Test Gates API
echo ""=== TEST: GET /api/v1/gates (Previously 500 Error) ===""
curl -s -H ""Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"" ""http://localhost:8300/api/v1/gates?page=1&page_size=3"" | python3 -m json.tool | head -50
')

Bash(bash -c '
# Login via external HTTPS endpoint
TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST https://sdlc-api.nqh.vn/api/v1/auth/login \
  -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" \
  -d '"''"'{""email"":""admin@sdlc-orchestrator.io"",""password"":""Admin@123""}'"''"' | \
  python3 -c ""import sys, json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['"''"'access_token'"''"'])"")

echo ""=== EXTERNAL HTTPS TEST ===""
echo ""Token: ${TOKEN:0:50}...""
echo

# Test external Gates API
curl -s -H ""Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"" ""https://sdlc-api.nqh.vn/api/v1/gates?page=1&page_size=2"" | python3 -c ""import sys, json; data = json.load(sys.stdin); print(f\""✅ SUCCESS: Got {len(data['"''"'items'"''"'])} gates\""); print(f\""   Total: {data['"''"'total'"''"']}\""); print(f\""   Gate 1: {data['"''"'items'"''"'][0]['"''"'gate_name'"''"']} - {data['"''"'items'"''"'][0]['"''"'status'"''"']}\""); print(f\""   Gate 2: {data['"''"'items'"''"'][1]['"''"'gate_name'"''"']} - {data['"''"'items'"''"'][1]['"''"'status'"''"']}\"")""
')

Bash(/home/nqh/shared/SDLC-Orchestrator/.env.production <<'EOF'
# SDLC Orchestrator - Production Environment Variables
# Sprint 33 - Centralized Configuration

# Application
APP_ENV=production
APP_NAME="SDLC Orchestrator"
APP_VERSION=1.1.0

# Backend API
BACKEND_HOST=localhost
BACKEND_PORT=8300
BACKEND_URL=http://${BACKEND_HOST}:${BACKEND_PORT}
BACKEND_EXTERNAL_URL=https://sdlc-api.nqh.vn

# Frontend
FRONTEND_HOST=localhost
FRONTEND_PORT=8310
FRONTEND_URL=http://${FRONTEND_HOST}:${FRONTEND_PORT}
FRONTEND_EXTERNAL_URL=https://sdlc.nqh.vn

# Database
POSTGRES_HOST=postgres
POSTGRES_PORT=5432
POSTGRES_DB=sdlc_orchestrator
POSTGRES_USER=sdlc_user
POSTGRES_PASSWORD=changeme_secure_password

# Redis
REDIS_HOST=redis
REDIS_PORT=6379
REDIS_PASSWORD=""

# MinIO
MINIO_HOST=minio
MINIO_PORT=9000
MINIO_EXTERNAL_PORT=9002
MINIO_ROOT_USER=minioadmin
MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD=minioadmin_changeme

# Prometheus
PROMETHEUS_PORT=9092

# Grafana
GRAFANA_PORT=3002

# Alertmanager
ALERTMANAGER_PORT=9095

# CORS Allowed Origins
ALLOWED_ORIGINS=https://sdlc.nqh.vn,http://localhost:8310,http://localhost:3000,http://localhost:4000,http://localhost:5173

# JWT
SECRET_KEY=dev-secret-key-change-in-production-minimum-32-characters-long
JWT_SECRET_KEY=dev-secret-key-change-in-production-minimum-32-characters-long
ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES=60
REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRE_DAYS=30
EOF)
